chunks.title: Finally keyword in Python
chunks.text: In last video we learned how to handle errors in python  After learning all this, our program won't face any more errors  But there is one more concept which I want to tell you  That is finally clause  Along with try and accept, you can also use finally for cleanups

chunks.title: Finally keyword in Python
chunks.text: And I will tell you what kind of cleanups it does  The code put inside finally always gets executed  Irrespective of whether the error occurred or not  Let's go to the computer screen, see this topic and let's get started  In try and accept, we used to try any code

chunks.title: Finally keyword in Python
chunks.text: Because if you have an error  In which you want  That you have established  The database connection  You can revoke it

chunks.title: Finally keyword in Python
chunks.text: Or you want  That you can clean up a file  Or you were opening a file  On which you were doing operations  You can close it

chunks.title: Finally keyword in Python
chunks.text: So if you want to do such a work  So what you have to do  That you have to put that thing  Inside finally  And your work will be done
